lines.speaker: You
lines.text: I suppose I can't ignore the new Master of Fetteresso Castle any longer... I need to survey the property again to make his new map.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: In my old age, I won't be able to do this alone.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: I heard that there were a few amateur surveyors in the area. They have submitted their previous surveys of the Fetteresso Estate - I should evaluate them against my old map, and hire the best man for the job.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: I should probably introduce myself first, though. I can use the MAP ICON to navigate the city.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: I should also remember that my map has my signature, and I can fact check their claims using my BOOK.
